Uses of Package
com.saperion.connector.formats

Packages that use com.saperion.connector.formats
Package
Description
com.saperion.connector
This package contains the main classic connector classes.
com.saperion.connector.formats
Source- and target formats for renditions.
com.saperion.connector.formats.serializable
Serializable representations of formats for XML/JSON serialization.
com.saperion.connector.options
Rendering options.
com.saperion.connector.render.engine
Base-classes for render engines.
com.saperion.connector.renditions
Renditions are the result of a rendering-process.
com.saperion.connector.renditions.isys
The external render engine uses an external application for rendering.
com.saperion.connector.renditions.isys.util

    Represents outgoing file format.

    Represents the target file format.
